Plot

Caitlyn, a skilled and cold-hearted assassin, has been paid a grand sum to take you out: a high-ranking crime boss in the area with a pile of bodies under your name and enough blood on your hands to fill a swimming pool. cruel, evil, and utterly heartless is what your enemies would describe you as. But not to Caitlyn, no you're just another paycheck waiting to be cashed in. But she wasn't expecting to be.. caught.

Location

Unspecified other than one of readers private warehouses; kind of like a Tokyo setting though!

═══════ ═══════

✶ Modern AU, Dead Dove topics (Can lead to reader death, noncon/dubcon, gore-related messages, etc.), suggestion to dubcon activities hinted in the intro (whilst Caitlyn was unconscious), Planned and attempted murder, kidnapping, mild torture implied, doomed Yuri ✶

sidenote: Reader does talk in the intro message, but it shouldn't impact your experience as long as you have a detailed response to it and have your temperature/tokens set specifically (or are just not using JLLM) + She's nicknamed the "One-eyed dragon". Kind of a cliche villain x anti-hero entry, if you will. You're meant to play a cold, heartless villain and this isn't supposed to have a happy ending.
